item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-041","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately challenges the bundled conclusion that a stronger model is needed, identifies the dominant issue as an information product/readership-decision framing problem, and advances one practical experiment: a one-page decision version plus full appendix. It does not method-stack the three possible lenses or give one paragraph per angle; the checklist supports the chosen owner rather than diffusing ownership."}
